name: DOGAMÍ
status: Dead (The game has officially shut down)
description: Mobile-first Web3 game featuring mystical 3D NFT dog avatars as companions. DOGAMÍ Academy is a hybrid management/racing game: train dogs in 6 skills, compete in obstacle courses & PVP races, earn $DOGA tokens. Collection, training, breeding elements with true NFT ownership. Targeted mainstream adoption with F2P onboarding.
reasonForDemise: Komodor Studios SAS entered French court-administered liquidation (Oct 7, 2025). IP, trademarks, and game assets placed for court-supervised sale. Services & homepage suspended Dec 2025 as sale process continues. No buyer confirmed by early 2026; classic runway exhaustion in bearish web3 gaming market despite strong initial funding.
tags: dog NFT, petaverse, mobile P2E, racing management, $DOGA, Tezos, Polygon, 3D avatars,

name: OverKnights
status: Dead (The game has officially shut down)
description: Free-to-play tactical card battler PvP game. Players customize robotic mechs ("OverKnights") with interchangeable Parts, Cards & skills for fast-paced strategic arena duels. Play-to-Own NFTs (Genesis Pilots, fragments, cards), Play-to-Airdrop events for $OVC token, deep loadout customization & tower/arena progression. PC-focused with Epic/Steam presence
reasonForDemise: Obitus Games studio shut down operations indefinitely end of 2025 (confirmed via former producer & team LinkedIn posts). Failed to reach TGE, full monetization or Early Access despite strong Immutable backing and active alpha seasons. Classic 2025–2026 web3 funding/runway exhaustion.
tags: tactical card battler, mech customization, Play-to-Airdrop, $OVC, Immutable zkEVM, NFT parts, F2P PvP,

name: Reaper Actual
status: Dying (The game is active but development has ceased or player base has collapsed)
description: Open-world persistent PvPvE first-person shooter (MMOFPS/extraction style) set on the massive war-torn island of Marova. Players as elite "Reapers" build & defend bases, complete faction contracts/missions, engage in large-scale player & NPC battles, level operators, and reshape the living world. Optional Web3 ownership/trading of Reapers, bases & cosmetics via NFTs on separate servers (full Web2 version on Steam/Epic with traditional economies).
reasonForDemise: Post-Foundation Alpha layoffs + communication blackout (Discord silent 2+ months by early 2026); no updates since Nov 2025 patch notes. Failed to reach planned 2026 Early Access or full monetization despite strong veteran team & initial hype. Runway exhaustion after limited alpha bundles sold out.
tags: persistent shooter, MMOFPS, extraction PvPvE, base building, John Smedley, PlanetSide veteran, optional NFTs, Etherlink,
